title: JSON schema for plex2pl config file.
description: configuration file to set required values for plex2pl

$schema.description: The URL of the JSON schema for type completion etc.

plexServerUrl.description: The URL of your plex server.

plexAuthToken.description: The token to authenticate with your plex server.

outDirectory.description: The output directory of the playlist files.

outputFormat.description: The playlist format to generate: 'm3u' files or 'jellyfin' native playlist.xml directories.

jellyfinOwnerUserId.description: The jellyfin user ID written as the playlist owner when using the 'jellyfin' output format.

verbose.description: If you want to show verbose output when running commands.
